source: Antigravity normalized CRM packet pasted into Codex

policy.messaging: do not send SMS or email from this packet
policy.secrets: no API keys, tokens, OAuth secrets, or private customer data are stored here
policy.claims: all facts, offers, images, contact routes, regulated claims, and time-sensitive details require owner or compliance approval before publication

crmPacket.campaignName: Central City / Black Hawk Corridor Access Concept
crmPacket.smsText: Approval contact pending, here is the Rick's Gondola Project campaign kit preview: https://satcom.5280.menu/generated-campaign-kits/idaho-01-rick-s-gondola-project-campaign-kit/ It includes the showcase, banners, newsletter block, pricing route, production kanban, SEO, and owner handoff files. Please review the contact info, current offer, service area, and claim guardrail before anything publishes.
crmPacket.emailBody:
Approval contact pending,

Here is the Rick's Gondola Project campaign kit preview:

https://satcom.5280.menu/generated-campaign-kits/idaho-01-rick-s-gondola-project-campaign-kit/

The kit includes the owner-facing showcase, banner set, newsletter block, pricing route, production kanban, SEO files, and handoff copy. Before anything publishes, please approve:

- Business/category positioning
- Contact route
- Current offer
- Service area
- Any regulated, price, inventory, availability, or time-sensitive claim

Verification note:
Do not publish prices, guarantees, regulated claims, availability, inventory, financing, warranties, coverage, service-area promises, or time-sensitive offers for Rick's Gondola Project unless the owner verifies them before publication.
crmPacket.seoDescription: Central City and Black Hawk corridor access concept with nightlife and visitor-flow guardrails; verify route, approvals, claims, and legal status before publication
crmPacket.claimGuardrail: Do not publish prices, guarantees, regulated claims, availability, inventory, financing, warranties, coverage, service-area promises, or time-sensitive offers for Rick's Gondola Project unless the owner verifies them before publication.

missingFieldsReport.notes: Needs stakeholder contact details, route approvals, legal/compliance notes, and custom concept art.
Needs owner or manager details, current hours, booking link, menu proof, and restaurant photos.
Requires corporate or local manager contact, approved weekly-ad language, and pharmacy/alcohol clearance.
Needs resort manager contact, rate/amenity URLs, approved spa imagery, and health/wellness claim review.
Requires license/compliance review, promotion contact, age restriction language, responsible-gaming signoff, and approved artwork.

safeNextActions: Import packet into CRM staging or review queue only.
Collect approval contact name, phone, and email for each account.
Attach approved artwork or mark placeholder art explicitly.
Run compliance review before any casino, grocery/pharmacy, health/wellness, pricing, promotion, or availability claim.
Request exactly one named CRM/API key only when a staged import is approved.
